cards.title: Heliotherapy & Aerotherapy
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Sunlight therapy: Morning sun 20–30 min, UV-A/B benefits
  • Air bath (Hawa Snan): Open air exposure protocol
  • Forest bathing (Shinrin-yoku): Phytoncides, NK cell evidence
  • Vitamin D protocol: D3 + K2, optimal levels 40–60 ng/mL
  • Bright light therapy: 10,000 lux, 30 min AM for SAD
